reviews.review_title: so much potential but ruined it
reviews.review_description: i LOVED AND I MEAN LOVED!! this game before it became pay to win sure i was fine with you having to buy the full game to get all the weapons and back then there was ranks sure but they didn’t do anything and back then there was also no pay to win but after one update everything got ruined there was skins “coins” which you could buy with money and gambling and now you have to level up to get weapons and everything or you could unlock stuff early with COINS which you can buy with money but that makes no sense right? you have to pay to spend hours levelling up to level 4 just to get a new knife when before you didn’t have to level up at ALL because all you had to do was buy fully game and you got EVERYTHING all attachments all weapons all meds all tools EVERYTHING but now you gotta spend time wasting 8.99 to just level up to unlock a gun at level 12 and the first attachment you get is somewhere near lvl 24 which is terrible

reviews.review_description: It supa fun

For a demo game, I love the features. The realism and graphics are some of the best that I’ve ever had on quest 2. Like the fact you can chamber a bullet by holding back the charging handle and putting a bullet in. However it can sometimes lead to a glitch where the gun can’t be grabbed and follows you on the floor. Would like if more guns are available and attachments. I know it’s a demo but just an MP5 and SCAR-L with 3 mags is a bit annoying. Please add the gun spawner to the demo Still great though

I like it, and it reminds me of COD with physics. But the spawner does not work after pressing the y button about a thousand times. If that could be more explained, that would be amazing

developer_response.body: Hey Gun World fan, thanks for the review and we love that you enjoyed the different weapons and physics in our game. We hope to see you in a multiplayer session someday. Cheers.

(This is my first time leaving a review on a vr game) I was really bored one day and I was tired of my other vr games. I came across a video that said to give this game a chance. I did and it was completely worth it. I have found myself getting lost for hours with the endless weapon customizations and maps to choose from. Overall it is a great game with tons a different features and the best part is it’s just getting started. I also love how on the TikTok page the game dev actually responds to comments and talks to the people who play the game or are just wondering about it. 10/10 game. I would consider it an essential to owning an oculus headset.

THE GOOD
-A high amount of weapons are available. Ranging from things everyone knows (AK, M4, etc.) all the way to the obscure, such as the Corner Shot gun.
-The feel of some guns feels pretty nice. While a little janky, holding that 1911 triggers something in my brain to make it shoot or something (I'm really bad at describing things)
-Customization, being able to change your character and hands with a variety of colors is really cool in my opinion. While it is slightly lacking in choices, you can be a Soldier or a robot, or change your hands to boxing gloves if that's what you're into.
-Decent NPC variety, while it's not a lot, some npcs include typical bad guys, soldiers, zombies, and even a small amount of animals. Never seen a VR sandbox game that has animal NPCs before.

reviews.review_description: Best Demo multiplayer ever. This game has really good mechanics and the physics of this game is just phenomenal. I could literally feel the recoil bouncing and hitting me in the chest due to the way the physics system in this game works. The guns have realistic weight, and will sway giving the feeling that I'm actually holding something heavy. 5/5 would recommend you try the demo, and the full game.

Bro you can't never shoot guns how do you expect me to play
Horrible demo

First off, the weapons do not have real “weight” like B&S or H3VR, the controllers just have delayed inputs to simulate weight. Second, the guns have no real grip points, so you could be holding the stock and it would have the same amount of recoil as a real grip would. Third, magazines are limited??? I get it’s a demo, but why not just limit players to 3-4 guns and 1 map. In a SHOOTING GAME you are going to want to fire a weapon more than one magazine worth.

developer_response.body: Hello dami, Thank you for your feedback! We're happy to hear that you enjoyed our Technical demo. We took note of your recommendations, let me tell you that some of them are already in the works. Do note this is a demo and it has limited ammo as explained in the description section, it is for showcasing what Gun World VR is able to do. Do reach out to us on Tiktok: (tiktok.com/@altointeractive), or Discord: (discord.gg/zdX9PCt) to let us know, we strive to engage with our fans in the best way possible.

reviews.review_description: I like it but werden need unlimited ammo
How do I reload

developer_response.body: Hello there!, Thank you for your feedback! We're happy to hear that you enjoyed our Technical demo. Lets help you get started on reloading, Gun World VR uses a unique reload system where you get to detach the magazine by pressing X or by gripping the mag and pressing X, making it feel more realistic and close to real life. Do reach out to us on Tiktok: (tiktok.com/@altointeractive), or Discord: (discord.gg/zdX9PCt) to let us know, we strive to engage with our fans in the best way possible.
